task:
Eclipse is open with the workspace at /home/user/workspace; a Java code-formatter profile XML file is available at /home/user/workspace/formatter_profile.xml (it defines a profile named 'TeamStyle' with tabulation char = space, tab size = 2, line split = 100).

Import that formatter profile and set 'TeamStyle' as the active workspace Java formatter profile so the workspace preferences end up with:

- `org.eclipse.jdt.core.prefs`: `org.eclipse.jdt.core.formatter.tabulation.char=space`, `org.eclipse.jdt.core.formatter.tabulation.size=2`, `org.eclipse.jdt.core.formatter.lineSplit=100`
- `org.eclipse.jdt.ui.prefs`: `formatter_profile` references `TeamStyle`
